["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h3",null,{"id":"debianubuntu-用户","children":"Debian/Ubuntu 用户"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"选择你的系统版本："}],"
",["$r","GlobalMenu",null,{"menus":[{"title":"操作系统版本","items":[["Debian 12",{"release":"bookworm","os":"debian"}],["Debian 11",{"release":"bullseye","os":"debian"}],["Ubuntu 24.04 LTS",{"release":"noble","os":"ubuntu"}],["Ubuntu 22.04 LTS",{"release":"jammy","os":"ubuntu"}]]}],"id":"globalMenu-0"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Mongoose IM 版本："}],"
",["$r","GlobalMenu",null,{"menus":[{"title":"MongooseIM 版本","items":[["MongooseIM 5",{"mongooseim-version":"mongooseim-5"}],["MongooseIM 6",{"mongooseim-version":"mongooseim-6"}]]}],"id":"globalMenu-1"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Erlang 版本："}],"
",["$r","GlobalMenu",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Erlang/OTP 版本","items":[["Erlang/OTP 24",{"erlang-version":"esl-erlang-24"}],["Erlang/OTP 25",{"erlang-version":"esl-erlang-25"}],["Erlang/OTP 26",{"erlang-version":"esl-erlang-26"}]]}],"id":"globalMenu-2"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"Elixir 版本："}],"
",["$r","GlobalMenu",null,{"menus":[{"title":"Elixir 版本","items":[["Elixir 1.14",{"elixir-version":"elixir-1.14"}],["Elixir 1.15",{"elixir-version":"elixir-1.15"}]]}],"id":"globalMenu-3"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["请注意：官方提供的软件列表可能经常变化，镜像站不保证能提供所有系统与软件的组合。
请在",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://www.erlang-solutions.com/downloads/","rel":"nofollow","children":"官网"}],"查询目前的可用版本，并根据实际情况指定版本。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["首先信任来自 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://www.erlang-solutions.com/downloads/","rel":"nofollow","children":"Erlang Solutions"}]," 的 PGP 公钥："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["新建 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/erlang-solutions.list"}],"，填入下列内容（可根据需要选择）："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","filepath":"/etc/apt/sources.list.d/erlang-solutions.list","enableQuickSetup":true}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["安装 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"esl-erlang"}]," 等软件包即可："]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","h3",null,{"id":"centos--rocky-linux-用户","children":"CentOS / Rocky Linux 用户"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["官方目前没有提供软件仓库，请前往",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://www.erlang-solutions.com/downloads/","rel":"nofollow","children":"官网"}]," 下载。"]}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-1: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/erlang-solutions-archive_compat.gpg] ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/");t.b(t.v(t.f("os",c,p,0)));t.b(" ");t.b(t.v(t.f("release",c,p,0)));t.b("-esl-erlang-");t.b(t.v(t.f("erlang-version",c,p,0)));t.b(" contrib");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/erlang-solutions-archive_compat.gpg] ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/");t.b(t.v(t.f("os",c,p,0)));t.b(" ");t.b(t.v(t.f("release",c,p,0)));t.b("-elixir-");t.b(t.v(t.f("elixir-version",c,p,0)));t.b(" contrib");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/erlang-solutions-archive_compat.gpg] ");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/");t.b(t.v(t.f("os",c,p,0)));t.b(" ");t.b(t.v(t.f("release",c,p,0)));t.b("-mongooseim-");t.b(t.v(t.f("mongooseim-version",c,p,0)));t.b(" contrib");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
compiledTemplates.template-2: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("apt-get update");t.b("\n" + i);t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("apt-get install -y elixir esl-erlang mongooseim");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
